form.formComment: At debut, 7th of 10 at Morphettville 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1200m, 5 len behind Tiptop Tori carrying 57kg at $8. Expected to do far better this time. Will be there at the business end.

form.formComment: Gelding by Yes Yes Yes on debut. Trialled on March 26 at Strathalbyn over 1000m and finished fourth. Unplaced in recent trials and looks tested.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign third of 12 at Strathalbyn 3yo+ Mdn-Sw December 24 over 1350m, a long neck behind Vaniteux with 56.5kg at $2.35. When resuming last campaign fourth of 7 at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw December 7 over 900m, 1.2 len behind Act Of Treachery with 57.5kg at $2.90. Anticipating him to hit the ground running this campaign.

form.formComment: First starter by Churchill out of Alanajune. Has a total of three trials leading in today's debut. Profiles well and a bold run is expected.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Churchill out of Alanajune. Has a total of three trials leading in today's debut. Profiles well and a bold run is expected.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when second last of 7 at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw on December 7 over 900m, 2 len behind Act Of Treachery carrying 53.5kg at $51. Others have better credentials.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four months break. Finished off last preparation fourth of 14 at Oakbank 3yo+ Mdn-Sw December 19 over 1050m, 3 len behind Flirt with 54.5kg at $5.50. On debut fifth of 7 at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw December 7 over 900m, 1.75 len behind Act Of Treachery with 55.5kg at $9.50. Anticipating her to hit the ground running this campaign.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly having first start by leading sire Written Tycoon out of Intricately. Purchased for AUD $ 6,500 (Inglis 2025 SEPTEMBER (Early) Online Sale). Was third in a Strathalbyn barrier trial over 1000m on March 26. Worth including.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign fifth of 14 at Strathalbyn 3yo+ Mdn-Sw February 1 over 1200m, 3 len behind Tenterk with 53kg at $10. First up last campaign ran last of 9 at Geelong 3yo Mdn-Sw September 25 over 1140m, 13 len behind Quickaz carrying 56kg at $101. Might be better off following this outing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign fifth of 14 at Strathalbyn 3yo+ Mdn-Sw February 1 over 1200m, 3 len behind Tenterk with 53kg at $10. First up last campaign ran last of 9 at Geelong 3yo Mdn-Sw September 25 over 1140m, 13 len behind Quickaz carrying 56kg at $101. Might be better off following this outing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start 5th of 13 at Morphettville 3yo Mdn-Sw on November 4 over 1200m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Harmonic Dancer carrying 55.5kg at $2.60. Went for a spell before racing on the pace when 3rd of 12 at Balaklava 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1200m, 0.5 len behind Leliyn carrying 55kg at $8.50. Further improvement in store.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Jumped at big odds at debut, eased back early on 5th of 10 at Port Lincoln 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1000m, 5 len behind Golden Tunes with 55kg at $26. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). Jumped at big odds at debut, eased back early on 5th of 10 at Port Lincoln 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1000m, 5 len behind Golden Tunes with 55kg at $26. Looking to others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced greenly under pressure in the straight and inclined to lay in.

form.formComment: Was at very long odds at debut, raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 11 at Morphettville Parks 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1250m, 4.5 len behind City Pro with 55kg at $51. Can progress and take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Was at very long odds at debut, raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 11 at Morphettville Parks 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1250m, 4.5 len behind City Pro with 55kg at $51. Can progress and take this out.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly (Castelvecchio - Smart Manoeuvre) who was bought for AUD $ 35,000 (Magic Millions 2024 Adelaide Yearling Sale). She has five recent trials prior to her debut today. Ran 3rd in a Strathalbyn trial over 1000m on March 26. Coming along well at the trials with a minor placing at her most recent at Strathalbyn.
